articles.author: Jason Owens
articles.title: Victor Wembanyama does it all with 40-20 game in 2 OTs to send Spurs past Thunder in Game 1 classic - Yahoo Sports Australia
articles.description: Wembanyama played the most minutes of his basketball career and made the most of them in an all-time performance.
articles.content:
The Oklahoma City Thunder cruised through the first two rounds of the playoffs with little challenge and without a loss.
But they didnt face anything like Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs… [+10523 chars]
